description: CORE_LIB requires exclusive compilation access (only one builder at a time)
SHARED_TYPES requires exclusive read/write access (only one agent at a time)
Both BUILDER_A and BUILDER_B depend on CORE_LIB during compilation
BUILDER_B depends on SHARED_TYPES produced by BUILDER_A
INTEGRATOR cannot begin linking until both builders complete successfully
If BUILDER_A updates SHARED_TYPES after BUILDER_B compiled, BUILDER_B must recompile
Both builders compile concurrently; INTEGRATOR links after both finish
Both BUILDER_A and BUILDER_B need CORE_LIB during compilation
